description: An analyst must assess the security of a new IoT device (e.g., a smart camera) before it is approved for corporate use.

nodes.task_description: Connect the IoT device to an isolated test network.

expected_outcome.expected: The device is safely isolated for testing.

nodes.task_description: Run a network vulnerability scanner against the device to identify open ports and known vulnerabilities in its services.

expected_outcome.expected: The scan reveals the device has an open Telnet port with default credentials.

nodes.task_description: Fail the device's security review and send a report to the vendor detailing the critical vulnerability.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst prevents an insecure device from being added to the network and notifies the vendor.
